metadata.lyrics:
[00:09.70] Tell me lies
[00:12.98] 
[00:49.87] If I could turn the page
[00:53.55] In time then I'd rearrange just a day or two
[00:59.22] Close my, close my, close my eyes
[01:05.00] But I couldn't find a way
[01:08.75] So I'll settle for one day to believe in you
[01:14.61] Tell me, tell me, tell me lies
[01:19.87] Tell me lies, tell me sweet little lies
[01:24.51] Tell me lies (tell me, tell me lies)
[01:27.66] Oh no, no, you can't disguise
[01:32.08] You can't disguise (no, you can't disguise)
[01:35.19] Tell me lies, tell me sweet little lies
[01:40.43] 
[01:43.47] Although I'm not making plans
[01:47.20] I hope that you understand there's a reason why
[01:53.03] Close your, close your, close your eyes
[01:59.11] No more broken hearts
